providers.name: HubSpot
providers.notes: PH high scenario (2,000 signups) can consume entire monthly cap in launch week.

providers.name: Brevo
constraints: Shared with CS agent transactional sends (PLAN.md)
providers.notes: Use separate lists: transactional-agent, nps, limit-hitter. Lifecycle + PH templates deployed here.

providers.name: OmniSend
constraints: 250 contact cap below 500 subs year-end goal
providers.notes: Migrate upgrade thank-you to Brevo paid at 250 subs.

providers.name: MailerLite
constraints: Contact cap binds before send cap
providers.notes: Priority queue: at-risk WAU > MAU > dead resurrection.

buckets.label: New users
buckets.definition: First day of engagement ever in the app

buckets.label: Current users
buckets.definition: Active today and at least one other day in the prior 6 days

buckets.label: Reactivated users
buckets.definition: First day back after 7–29 days away

buckets.label: Resurrected users
buckets.definition: First day back after 30+ days away

buckets.label: At-risk WAU
buckets.definition: Inactive today, active on at least one of the prior 6 days

buckets.label: At-risk MAU
buckets.definition: Inactive today and prior 6 days; active 7–29 days ago

buckets.label: Dead users
buckets.definition: No activity in the last 30 days

capacity_cliffs.action: Queue welcomes across months or route overflow to Brevo transactional list
Prune 12-month inactive; upgrade Brevo before PH high
Move upgrade thank-you and cancelled win-back to Brevo paid tier
Priority queue at-risk only; cap dead resurrection; upgrade ~$10/mo

capacity_cliffs.trigger: CS agent + marketing compete for daily send cap
capacity_cliffs.action: Separate Brevo sub-account or dedicated transactional list for agent

sequences.name: PH teaser (waitlist)
sequences.trigger_summary: Waitlist contact before Product Hunt launch
sequences.free_tier_runway: Reusable template for future launches (Windows, Linux, mobile, etc.)

preview.subject: Tomorrow on Product Hunt (+ a launch-day surprise)
preview.preheader: Privacy-first AI browser. Something special for genuine launch-day feedback.

sequences.name: PH launch (waitlist)
sequences.trigger_summary: Product Hunt launch day — waitlist + new signups
sequences.trigger_when: May 27, 2026 — when PH listing is live
sequences.trigger_implementation: Manual send once PH listing live; Brevo waitlist segment
sequences.free_tier_runway: Reusable for future product launches and platform expansions

preview.subject: We're live on Product Hunt: 6 months of Zen, on us
preview.preheader: Leave genuine feedback on our launch page. Reply with a screenshot to claim 1M tokens/day.

sequences.name: Welcome
sequences.trigger_summary: Account created / new Oasis user signup
sequences.trigger_implementation: Brevo automation: new Oasis user signup
sequences.free_tier_runway: Strategy: HubSpot until >2k/mo; shipped on Brevo

preview.subject: Welcome to Oasis
preview.preheader: Docs, Slack, and support links to get started.

sequences.name: NPS
sequences.trigger_summary: NPS survey after a few days with the product

preview.subject: Quick question: how likely are you to recommend Oasis?
preview.preheader: One question. Your feedback helps us improve.

preview.subject: Help us understand how Oasis fits your workflow
preview.preheader: 2-minute product survey. Your answers shape what we build next.

sequences.name: Paid Zen welcome
sequences.trigger_implementation: Stripe checkout OR Brevo when plan = Zen
sequences.free_tier_runway: Strategy: OmniSend until 250 paid; shipped on Brevo

preview.subject: Welcome to Oasis Zen
preview.preheader: 1M tokens per day and priority support are now active.

sequences.name: At-risk nurture
sequences.trigger_summary: User enters at-risk WAU or at-risk MAU bucket
sequences.trigger_when: On bucket transition; WAU cohort prioritized over MAU
sequences.free_tier_runway: Until net dead inflow ~500/month OR contacts > 500

sequences.name: Activation nudge
sequences.trigger_summary: No AI prompt within 24h of signup
sequences.trigger_when: 24h after signup if zero llm_usage rows
sequences.trigger_implementation: activation_24h cohort: users_with_first_prompt == false at T+24h
sequences.free_tier_runway: Shares HubSpot monthly cap; overflow to Brevo

sequences.name: Limit-hitter upgrade
sequences.trigger_summary: Free user hits daily token cap
sequences.trigger_when: First limit hit; optional D7 reminder if still free
sequences.trigger_implementation: users_hit_limit AND user NOT IN paid_subscribers
sequences.free_tier_runway: Brevo 300/day; use dedicated list separate from NPS

sequences.name: Dead resurrection
sequences.trigger_summary: User in dead bucket, eligible for win-back
sequences.trigger_when: Day 0 + day 14 of campaign; cap 20 new users/month when contacts tight
sequences.trigger_implementation: bucket=dead AND NOT emailed in 30d AND NOT 12mo absent
sequences.free_tier_runway: Lowest MailerLite priority after at-risk cohorts

sequences.name: Return reinforcement
sequences.trigger_when: First day in reactivated or resurrected bucket
sequences.trigger_implementation: bucket transition to reactivated OR resurrected
sequences.free_tier_runway: Shares MailerLite contact cap with nurture/resurrection

sequences.name: Cancelled sub win-back
sequences.free_tier_runway: Active after OmniSend free tier full (250 paid)

pseudo_buckets.label: Waitlist / acquisition
pseudo_buckets.definition: Pre-signup or launch-funnel contacts entering as new users (PH and future launches)

pseudo_buckets.label: Paid (Stripe)
pseudo_buckets.definition: Active Zen / $20/mo user_plans row from 2026-05-24 onward

pseudo_buckets.label: Limit hitters
pseudo_buckets.definition: Free users who hit daily token cap (cross-bucket monetization segment)
